description: Port Gotify listens on (default: 8080). Railway injects PORT for routing.
Default admin username for the Gotify web UI.
Default admin password. Auto-generated on first deploy — change after setup.
Database engine: sqlite3, mysql, or postgres. SQLite is built-in and automatic.
Database connection string. For SQLite: data/gotify.db. For Postgres: ${{Postgres.DATABASE_URL}}
Allow public user registration (true/false). Default is false — disable to prevent open signups.
